noticia.titulo: The Devil’s Teardrop (2025) Film Review – Demons in the Forest [Unnamed Footage Festival]
noticia.texto_resumido: The debut feature film from Peruvian director Gonzalo Otero sees four Americans heading to a remote mining area. Coaxed into going by Sarah (Sydney Amanuel) for her ecological documentary, the four soon find themselves stuck in a loop at the mine site, with bizarre totems, creatures, and distorted people coming after them. Unable to leave, Continue Reading
